      Start simple
      • Begin with a short prayer before you read
      • Ask for clarity, not perfection
      As you read
      • Highlight anything that stands out
      • If one verse hits, stay there
      • Pay attention to what repeats
      Understand it
      • Ask who is speaking and why
      • Look up context if something feels unclear
      • Watch a short video if you need help
      Make it yours
      • Write a quick note about what it means to you
      • Save verses you want to come back to
      • Sit with what feels personal
      Live it
      • Ask how you can apply this today
      • Carry one thought with you through the day

            Daily reminder

            How invitations to pause should read.

            About Grounded

            Grounded is a quiet space to grow closer to God — one moment at a time.

            Every day, Grounded gives you a verse, a guided reflection, and a place to write what’s on your heart. No noise. No pressure. Just you, God, and a few still minutes to breathe and come back to what matters.

            What you’ll find inside

            • A daily verse chosen for where you are
            • Guided reflection questions to go deeper
            • A personal journal to capture your thoughts
            • Prayer prompts to help you find the words
            • Weekly themes to keep you rooted and growing

            Reset — body, mind, and spirit

            Grounded goes beyond the page. The Reset space connects your faith to your body through guided Pilates videos and meditations designed to help you release tension, slow your thoughts, and settle into stillness. Because spiritual growth isn’t just mental — it lives in how you breathe, move, and rest too.

            Whether you’ve walked with God for years or you’re just beginning to explore faith, Grounded meets you exactly where you are — no theology degree required, no guilt if you miss a day.

            Just show up. That’s enough.

            Grounded. Begin where you are.

            Privacy · Terms · Contact

            Privacy Policy

            Last updated: April 27, 2026

            Grounded is designed to be a private, personal experience focused on reflection, reading, and spiritual growth.

            We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about how your information is handled.

            Information we collect

            Grounded does not collect or store personally identifiable information such as your name, email address, or personal identity unless explicitly required for a feature.

            We may collect limited, non-personal data such as:

            • App usage data (to improve performance and experience)
            • Device type and general technical information

            Your personal content

            Your personal reflections, journal entries, and inputs are not monitored, sold, or shared.

            Where possible, this information is stored locally on your device and remains private to you.

            AI processing

            Grounded includes features that generate responses based on selected content (such as “Explain this chapter” or guided reflections).

            When you use these features:

            • The selected text (such as a verse or prompt) may be sent securely to a third-party AI service (such as OpenAI) to generate a response.
            • No personally identifiable information is required or intentionally collected for this process.
            • Responses are generated in real time and are not used to identify you personally.

            How your information is used

            Any limited data collected is used only to:

            • Improve app functionality and performance
            • Enhance user experience
            • Maintain reliability and stability

            We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing or advertising purposes.

            Third-party services

            Grounded may use trusted third-party services (such as hosting providers, analytics tools, or AI providers) to support functionality.

            These services may process limited technical data necessary for operation but do not receive personal identity information from us.

            Data security

            We take reasonable measures to protect your information. However, no system can guarantee 100% security.

            Your privacy

            Grounded is built to be a safe, private space.

            Your reflections, thoughts, and personal moments are yours alone.

            Children’s privacy

            Grounded is not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

            Changes to this policy

            We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.

            Contact

            If you have any questions, you can contact us at:

            support@getgroundedapp.com

            Terms of Use

            Last updated: April 2026

            Welcome to Grounded. By using this app, you agree to the following terms.

            Use of the App

            Grounded is designed for personal, non-commercial use. You may not copy, distribute, or misuse the content within the app.

            Wellness Disclaimer

            Grounded provides spiritual, reflective, and wellness-based content. It is not intended to replace medical, mental health, or professional advice. If you are experiencing serious emotional or mental health concerns, please seek support from a qualified professional.

            Spiritual Content

            All scripture reflections, guidance, and devotional content are meant to support personal growth and connection. They are not presented as authoritative interpretation.

            AI-Generated Content

            Some features within the app use AI to generate reflections, explanations, or prompts. While we aim for meaningful and accurate content, responses may not always be perfect or complete.

            Third-Party Content

            Grounded may display or link to third-party content (such as YouTube videos). We do not control or take responsibility for external content.

            Limitation of Liability

            Grounded is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any outcomes resulting from the use of the app.

            Changes to These Terms

            We may update these terms as the app evolves. Continued use of the app means you accept any updates.

            Contact

            If you have questions, contact us at:

            support@getgroundedapp.com

            Contact

            We’re here if you need anything.

            For support, questions, or feedback

            support@getgroundedapp.com

            We typically respond within 24–48 hours.

              How Grounded works

              Each week you’ll explore one theme — a specific area of inner work, faith, or growth. Every day builds on the last. Your verse, guided moment, and reflection all connect to where you are in the week.

              5 days · one theme

              What should we call you?

              This helps make your experience feel more personal.

              Why are you here?

              You can select more than one.

              How much time do you want to spend with God each day?

              You can always change this later.

              When would you like to take your daily moment?

              We’ll gently remind you — you can change this anytime.

              Friend, you’re in the right place.

              This is your space. Come back to it every day.

              No pressure. Just a few minutes.
